hypothesis: A reflow-first landing layout with a single primary hero CTA, main-column synthesis blocks, compact month-tile archive heat-map, and a promo-only sidebar increases clicks on today's brief and weekly/monthly rollups without reducing subscribe or cross-edition engagement.
change_summary: Refactor homepage (index) under SITE_LANDING_LAYOUT_V2=1: primary "Read today's brief" CTA, secondary hero actions, main column (How it works / About, month-grid Daily Archive, Weekly, Monthly), promo-only sidebar, and WCAG AA footer contrast.
notes: Baseline started 2026-07-18 (9 days early vs original 2026-07-27 plan). Runs in parallel with EXP-20260716-firecrawl-enrich-skills (site vs digest). Keep SITE_LANDING_LAYOUT_V2 unset/off during baseline; enable repo variable at treatment start (2026-08-01). Next Skills-ranking experiment after this + firecrawl complete: EXP-20260715-soft-dedup-diversity-skills (baseline planned 2026-08-15). Linked capture: EPH-20260701-LAND. PostHog event: homepage_index_click with props { edition, cta, target_path }. Import snapshots via npm run experiment -- snapshot EXP-20260701-landing-layout --csv path/to/posthog-export.csv after each window; rebuild with npm run build:pages.
